kyc.title: Identity Verification (KYC)
kyc.step1_desc: To ensure the security of your account and comply with regulations, we need to verify your identity.
kyc.step2_desc: Please upload a clear photo of your selected document.
kyc.upload_prompt: Click to upload or drag and drop
kyc.success_desc: Your KYC documents have been submitted successfully. We will review them shortly.

chatbot.welcome: Hi 👋 How can I help you today?
chatbot.collect_name: I'm sorry, but that's outside my knowledge base. Let me collect some information to create a support ticket for you. What is your name?
chatbot.error_response: I'm not sure how to respond to that.
chatbot.error_connection: I'm having trouble connecting to my knowledge base right now. Please try again later.
chatbot.collect_email: Thanks, {{name}}. What is your email address?
chatbot.invalid_email: That doesn't look like a valid email. Please enter a valid email address.
chatbot.collect_issue: Got it. Finally, please describe your issue or question in detail.
chatbot.ticket_success: Thank you! Your support ticket has been submitted. Our team will get back to you at {{email}} soon.
chatbot.ticket_error: Sorry, there was an error submitting your ticket. Please try again later.
chatbot.ticket_network_error: Sorry, there was a network error submitting your ticket.
chatbot.title: CGA Support

about.founderText: Capital Growth Alliance, established by Willis Anthony in 2010, emerged in the wake of Bitcoin's launch and has been actively engaged in forex trading for over 13 years. Willis Anthony's vision was to create a platform that bridges traditional finance with the emerging digital economy.
about.bitcoinText: Recognizing the transformative potential of blockchain technology early on, we integrated Bitcoin and other digital assets into our core trading strategies, providing our clients with unparalleled exposure to high-growth markets.
about.forexText: With over a decade of experience navigating the complexities of the foreign exchange markets, our team of seasoned traders employs advanced algorithmic strategies to deliver consistent returns.
about.intersectionText: We uniquely blend the rigorous risk management of traditional finance with the innovative opportunities of decentralized finance, offering a balanced and robust investment portfolio.
about.investorsText: Our commitment to transparency and performance has earned the trust of a global community of over 200,000 investors who rely on us for their wealth generation.
about.millionairesText: Through our strategic investment plans and compounding returns, we have proudly assisted thousands of our clients in achieving millionaire status and financial independence.
about.partnershipsText: We collaborate with industry-leading institutions and technology providers to ensure our platform remains at the cutting edge of security and performance.
about.liquidityText: To guarantee seamless transactions and deep market access, we maintain a substantial liquidity pool on Binance, one of the world's largest cryptocurrency exchanges.
about.heroSubtitle: Pioneering the future of digital asset investment and forex trading since 2010.
about.ctaTitle: Your Journey to Financial Success Begins Today

faq.a1: Capital Growth Alliance is a premier investment platform specializing in forex and cryptocurrency trading, founded in 2010.
faq.a2: Simply create an account, complete your KYC verification, deposit funds, and choose an investment plan that suits your goals.
faq.a3: Yes, we employ industry-leading security protocols, cold storage solutions, and maintain deep liquidity pools to ensure your funds are protected.
faq.a4: The minimum deposit varies depending on the investment plan you choose, starting from as low as $100.
faq.a5: Withdrawals can be requested at any time from your dashboard and are typically processed within 24 hours to your designated wallet or bank account.
faq.q6: Do you have a referral program?
faq.a6: Yes, you can earn a 5% commission on the deposits made by users who sign up using your unique referral link.
faq.heroSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about our platform, investment plans, and security.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Investors Worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied users who are growing their wealth with our platform.
testimonials.t1: Incredible platform, my portfolio has grown significantly since I started using it.
testimonials.t2: Very easy to use and the customer support is top-notch.
testimonials.t3: The best crypto trading experience I've had. Highly recommended!
testimonials.t4: Secure, fast, and reliable. Exactly what I need for my investments.
testimonials.t5: Great features and low fees. The interface is very intuitive.
testimonials.t6: I love the automated investment plans. It makes growing my wealth effortless.
testimonials.t7: Fantastic returns and a very transparent system. I feel safe investing here.
testimonials.t8: Good platform overall, the mobile experience is particularly smooth.
testimonials.t9: The analytics tools are incredibly detailed and helpful for my trading strategy.
testimonials.t10: Fast withdrawals and excellent security measures. A trustworthy platform.
testimonials.t11: Solid performance and a great selection of assets to trade.
testimonials.t12: The educational resources helped me get started quickly. Great for beginners!
testimonials.t13: I've tried many platforms, but this one stands out for its reliability.
testimonials.t14: Very satisfied with the ROI on the elite plans. Customer service is responsive.
